case_title: BRUCE JAY SALTZINE VS. VOLUME SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALTZINE, BRUCE JAY AS TO DEFENDANT VOLUME SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA VOLUME SERVICES AMERICA/CENTER PLATE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
